svg.title: Sequence Diagram – Application Submission and Review Flow
svg.desc: UML sequence diagram showing messages between Student, Browser UI, Web Controller, AuthService, AppService, Database, CoordinatorUI, and EmailService over time.
svg.text: Solid arrow = synchronous call | Dashed arrow = return message | Rect on lifeline = activation box
Vertical dashed line = lifeline | Numbers = message sequence order | Box header = object : ClassName
